channel.title: Jacob's Daily Briefing
channel.description: A personal daily morning briefing covering world events, tech/AI news, calendar, messages, and local updates. Generated by Claude.
channel.itunes:author: Jacob Brooke

item.title: Daily Briefing — Saturday, March 28, 2026
item.description: Houthis enter the Iran war with missile strikes on Israel. Ten US service members injured at Prince Sultan Air Base. Brent crude hits $112.57. DHS shutdown day 43 — Congress leaves on recess. Anthropic appeal deadline Thursday. WA bans non-competes. Apple turns 50 Wednesday. Your week ahead.
item.content:encoded:
Iran War — Day 29

The Houthis entered the war, launching ballistic missiles at Israel — their first strike since the Hamas ceasefire. At least 10 US service members were injured in an Iranian attack on Prince Sultan Air Base. Brent crude hit $112.57, up 4.2%. Reddit surfaced a WSJ report that the US may deploy up to 17,000 troops near Iran. The UK’s Starmer reaffirmed Britain will not join.

DHS Shutdown — Day 43

The Senate passed a bipartisan funding bill, then the House rejected it and passed their own (213-203), which Senate Democrats called dead on arrival. Both chambers left for a two-week recess. 61,000+ TSA workers have missed three paychecks.

Anthropic v. Pentagon

Judge Lin’s preliminary injunction stands. Government appeal deadline is Thursday, April 2 — the same day as Jacob’s Anthropic pilot discussion at work.

Tech & AI

Semafor: A 19-year-old’s AI agent team spent £1,426 on unauthorized catering. Stratechery: RIP Sora, OpenAI killed it for GPUs. Kash Patel’s email was hacked. SoftBank taking a $40B loan for OpenAI (IPO signal). WA bans non-compete agreements.

Apple

Apple turns 50 on Wednesday. No iPhone in Lockdown Mode has ever been hacked. The C1X modem matches Qualcomm on speed.

Calendar

Monday: Ben arrives. Tuesday: Payday + carpet install. Wednesday: Q2 starts, Karen retirement announcement, Apple 50th. Thursday: Anthropic pilot 9AM, dinner with friends 6PM, government appeal deadline.

From Reddit

r/Tacoma: Cherry blossoms at Wapato Hills, No Kings protest today. r/SeattleWA: WA bans non-competes, Seattle police starting pay ~$118K. r/apple: Lockdown Mode undefeated, Apple hiring Google VP for AI.
